message:
viz: story autoplay, inline highlight/cache/perf tests, perf budgets

- bd-24q.4.4: Story autoplay/playback integration with milestone
  pausing, Tour button, URL state (sa/si params), mobile support
- bd-24q.16.3: Inline highlights unit tests (20+ assertions for
  hunk-to-DOM mapping, sentinel rendering, navigation, debug toggle)
- bd-24q.5.4: Cache + worker protocol unit tests (20 tests for
  LruCache keying/eviction, handleWorkerMessage, workerRequest)
- bd-24q.5.3: Performance budget logging (PERF object, perfMark/
  perfMeasure/perfReport, hit/miss tracking, dev panel, Ctrl+Shift+P)
- bd-24q.5.5: Performance E2E tests (8 scenarios for PERF object,
  cache tracking, perfReport, worker status, perf panel toggle)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
